description_long: This kiosk is a modern exhibition booth designed for AstraZeneca, featuring a prominent back wall with a large printed graphic displaying medical imagery and branding. The structure includes two angled side panels that extend forward, creating a semi-enclosed space with integrated counters and display screens. The floor area is defined by a patterned mat and is furnished with several cushioned stools in neutral tones, providing seating for visitors. The main counter areas are equipped with product displays and informational signage, while the overall color scheme combines white, gold, and purple accents. The kiosk is open at the front, allowing easy access for attendees, and the back wall serves as the primary visual anchor with bold text and imagery. The materials appear to be a mix of laminated wood, plastic, and fabric, with some metallic elements for structural support.
description: A modern AstraZeneca exhibition kiosk with a large graphic back wall, angled side panels, integrated counters, and cushioned seating in a white, gold, and purple color scheme.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open entrance, large branded back wall, counters, and seating area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angled side panel, counter depth, and arrangement of seating.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the overall footprint, roof structure, and layout of the kiosk.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other angled panel, counter, and seating configuration.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo on the back wall, integrated into the structure, with visible text 'AstraZeneca', 'CVRM', and medical graphics.
attribute_door_configuration: Open archway at the front, no doors present.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with a slight overhang, constructed from solid panels, no skylights or decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern exhibition style with minimalist, angular lines and branded graphics.
